description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomous mode was stopped for a red traffic light on westbound 16th Street at the intersection with Potrero 
Avenue in San Francisco. An SUV (Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind the Zoox vehicle failed to come to a stop and rear-ended the stopped
 Zoox vehicle. The SUV driver reversed, then left the scene without attempting to exchange information. After the collision, the Zoox 
vehicle remained stopped, then later cleared the intersection. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the license plate bracket. There 
were no reported injuries and the police were not called. The Zoox vehicle camera footage shows the SUV driver was not looking ahead at 
the roadway before or at the time of contact.
Print
Clear Form
